acceptanceCriteria: implementation_schema_valid validates against the implementation-artifact JSON Schema (not field-presence-only).

implementation_tdd_evidence for code under backend/, apps/, infra/, packages/: ≥1 RGR cycle; passing command evidence; non-empty testsAdded or testsUpdated; reject tokenUsage.total == 0 when executionDurationMs > 60000.
executor_domain_matches_cache fails on domain mismatch; passes on match.
phase_run_correlation requires matching phaseRunId across implementation, intent-review, review, and validation when those artifacts are required/present.
release_metadata_honesty rejects hardcoded smokeTestsPassed / healthChecksPassed true without step evidence.
Unit matrix covers pass and each failure mode above.
New checks are runnable standalone and suitable for registration in the validation generator (wiring completed in #516).

candidateVerificationJourney.restrictedRoute: n/a — META-3 harness CI validators only; no public cutover

migrationCompatibility.notes: No DB schema change. Additive agent-runtime CI validators only.
